question: An immersion suit will not sustain burning or continue melting after being totally enveloped in a fire for a period of:
answers: 2 sec.
1 min.
20 sec.
10 sec.
correct_answer: 2 sec.

question: You have abandoned ship in a liferaft. In most cases, which of the following actions should you generally take?
answers: Organise a lookout system. Join up with other survival craft if possible. Stream the sea anchor.
Join up with any other survival craft and stream the sea anchor.
Start padding in the direction of the nearest land.
Organise a lookout system.
correct_answer: Organise a lookout system. Join up with other survival craft if possible. Stream the sea anchor.
explanation: ජීවිතාරක්ෂක පහුරකට (Liferaft) නැඟුණු පසු, ඔබ ප්‍රධාන වශයෙන් කළ යුත්තේ අවට නිරීක්ෂණය සඳහා පිරිසක් යෙදවීම (Lookout), හැකි නම් අනෙකුත් පහුරු සමඟ සම්බන්ධ වීම සහ මුහුදු නැංගුරම (Sea anchor) භාවිත කිරීමයි. මුහුදු නැංගුරම මගින් පහුර ගසාගෙන යාම පාලනය කරන අතර ස්ථායීතාවය වැඩි කරයි. අනෙක් අතට, කිසිදු ඉලක්කයකින් තොරව හබල් ගෑම හෝ ආහාර වැඩිපුර පරිභෝජනය කිරීම වැනි ක්‍රියා මගින් දිවි ගලවා ගැනීමේ අවස්ථාව අඩු වේ.

question: Where do you find instructions for tasks and duties in case of an emergency?
answers: In the muster list.
On posters at the lifeboat station.
In instruction notices posted in the crew’s cabins.
correct_answer: In the muster list.

question: What is the minimum distance between the helmet and the head of the wearer supposed to be?
answers: 3 cm.
No minimum distance.
1 cm.
correct_answer: 3 cm.

question: What kind of permits have to be obtained before starting cold work in tanks?
answers: Cold work permit + Permit for entry.
Cold work permit.
Hot + Cold work permit.
Hot work permit.
correct_answer: Cold work permit + Permit for entry.

question: Which of these are indications that a parcel is suspicious?
answers: The parcel is addressed to no one in particular, arrives unexpectedly and seems heavy for its size.
The parcel smells like chocolate.
The parcel is wrapped in clean, brown paper and is addressed to a crewmember from his wife.
The parcel came from Joe in the safety department and arrived quicker than expected.
correct_answer: The parcel is addressed to no one in particular, arrives unexpectedly and seems heavy for its size.

question: Which of these are indicators that an individual may be a drug smuggler?
answers: The individual wears bulky or out of season clothing.
The individual is disinterested in the ship’s cargo.
The individual spends his or her free time hanging out with others.
The individual makes small local purchases.
correct_answer: The individual wears bulky or out of season clothing.
explanation: මත්ද්‍රව්‍ය ජාවාරම්කරුවන් හඳුනා ගැනීමේ එක් ප්‍රධාන ලක්ෂණයක් වන්නේ ඔවුන් ශරීරයට වඩා විශාල හෝ කාලගුණයට නොගැලපෙන ඝන ඇඳුම් (Bulky clothing) ඇඳ සිටීමයි. මෙසේ කරන්නේ මත්ද්‍රව්‍ය පාර්සල් හෝ වෙනත් නීතිවිරෝධී ද්‍රව්‍ය සිරුරේ සඟවාගෙන යාමට පහසු වන බැවිනි. සාමාන්‍ය මගියෙකු හෝ සේවකයෙකු මෙවැනි සැකකටයුතු අයුරින් ඇඳුම් අඳින්නේ නැත. අනෙකුත් සාමාන්‍ය හැසිරීම් පමණක් මත්ද්‍රව්‍ය ජාවාරම්කරුවෙකු බව තහවුරු කිරීමට ප්‍රමාණවත් සාක්ෂි නොවේ.

question: Steam escaping from the area of the bottom water header handhole doors of a high pressure boiler generating superheated steam is observed by the engine rating on watch. What action should be taken?
answers: Immediately inform the Officer of the Watch.
Use the hand to have a feel around the area to try and locate the exact position of the leak.
Check the area where it is thought the leak may be using a cloth on the end of a broom handle.
Pass the information that there is a leak to the relief at the end of the watch.
correct_answer: Immediately inform the Officer of the Watch.

question: When cleaning boiler burner nozzles that have just been in service the watch rating notices that the nozzle holes are partially blocked. Which of the methods given in the options is the preferred method to use in order to avoid damaging the nozzle holes?
answers: Use cleaning wires starting with a small gauge and gradually work up to the full size of the nozzle hole.
Use a standard drill bit in a hand drill to clear the blockage.
Knock the nozzle repeatedly on the work bench to try and dislodge the blockage.
Poke the holes clear with a welding rod which has been ground down to size.
correct_answer: Use cleaning wires starting with a small gauge and gradually work up to the full size of the nozzle hole.
explanation: බොයිලේරු බර්නර් නොසල් (burner nozzles) පිරිසිදු කිරීමේදී, එහි සිදුරු වලට හානි නොවන පරිදි කටයුතු කිරීම අත්‍යවශ්‍ය වේ. මේ සඳහා වඩාත්ම සුදුසු ක්‍රමය වන්නේ කුඩා ප්‍රමාණයේ සිට නොසල් සිදුරේ නියමිත ප්‍රමාණය දක්වා ක්‍රමයෙන් විශාල වන පිරිසිදු කිරීමේ කම්බි (cleaning wires) භාවිතා කිරීමයි. පිහි හෝ දෘඩ ලෝහ කූරු භාවිතයෙන් සිදුරේ හැඩය වෙනස් විය හැකි අතර, එමගින් ඉන්ධන දහනය අක්‍රමවත් වී බොයිලේරුවේ කාර්යක්ෂමතාව අඩු වේ.

question: While assisting the watchkeeper with routine cleaning of the fuel oil separator the watch rating is requested to clean the plate stack. Which one is the preferred method for this task?
answers: Soak the plates in a suitable solvent until all of the dirt has loosened off and wipe clean with rags.
With the plate stack in position fill the purifier bowl with clean diesel oil and quickly switch it on and off to wash the plates.
Soak the dirty plates in a solvent for an hour and then stand them on the engine room deck to drain off.
Scrape the plates as clean as possible with a packing knife and then wash them with a high pressure water hose.
correct_answer: Soak the plates in a suitable solvent until all of the dirt has loosened off and wipe clean with rags.

question: As part of the routine duties a rating on boiler watch is requested to assist with the daily chemical treatment for the boiler and feed water systems. Where will the rating find the information relating to the hazards associated with the chemicals involved in this task?
answers: The material safety data sheets supplied with the chemicals.
The Chief Engineer’s standing orders.
The Code of Safe Working Practices for Merchant Seaman.
The engine room log book.
correct_answer: The material safety data sheets supplied with the chemicals.

question: When checking the diesel engine jacket water header tanks as part of the routine watch checks the engine room watch rating finds the level is well below normal. After topping up the tank and checking around the engine a leak is found. What action should be taken?
answers: Try and quickly stop the leak and then inform the engineer on watch of what has happened.
Put a bucket under the leak and refill the header tank with the water that collects in the bucket to save water.
Leave the filling valve open a little bit to make up for the leakage.
Check the tank and top it up more frequently.
correct_answer: Try and quickly stop the leak and then inform the engineer on watch of what has happened.

question: What is the most suitable type of packing for a shaft gland of a pump used for seawater duties?
answers: Greasy cotton packing.
Mica impregnated cotton packing.
PTFE rope packing.
Lead covered cotton packing.
correct_answer: Greasy cotton packing.
explanation: මුහුදු ජලය පම්ප් කරන පොම්පයක shaft gland එකක් සඳහා වඩාත් සුදුසු ඇසුරුම වන්නේ 'Greasy cotton packing' ය. කපු (Cotton) මෘදු වන අතර ජලය උරා ගැනීමේ හැකියාව ඇත. එහි අඩංගු ග්‍රීස් මගින් shaft එක ලිහිසි කරන අතර මුහුදු ජලයෙන් සිසිලනය ලබා දෙයි. රබර් හෝ ප්ලාස්ටික් ඇසුරුම් අධික තාපය නිසා දිය විය හැකි අතර shaft එකට හානි කළ හැකිය. ඇස්බැස්ටෝස් (Asbestos) සෞඛ්‍යයට අහිතකර බැවින් දැන් භාවිතා නොවේ. ලෝහමය ඇසුරුම් (Metallic packing) මගින් shaft එක සීරීමට ලක්විය හැකි බැවින් කපු මිශ්‍ර ඇසුරුම් වඩාත් ප්‍රායෝගික වේ.

question: An engine room rating is assisting in the maintenance of some of the valves on the low pressure steam range. Which packing material, from the options given, would be the best choice for repacking the gland of a low pressure steam valve?
answers: Graphite fibre packing.
Greasy cotton packing.
PTFE rope packing.
Lead covered cotton packing.
correct_answer: Graphite fibre packing.
explanation: අඩු පීඩන වාෂ්ප වෑල්ව (Low pressure steam valves) සඳහා ග්‍රැෆයිට් ෆයිබර් පැකින් (Graphite fibre packing) වඩාත් සුදුසු වේ. ග්‍රැෆයිට් වලට ඉහළ උෂ්ණත්වයන්ට ඔරොත්තු දීමේ හැකියාව ඇති අතර එය ස්වයං-ලිහිස්සි ද්‍රව්‍යයක් (Self-lubricating) ලෙස ක්‍රියා කරයි. කපු (Cotton) හෝ හෙම්ප් (Hemp) වැනි ද්‍රව්‍ය වාෂ්ප වල උෂ්ණත්වය නිසා ඉක්මනින් පිලිස්සී ගොස් කාන්දු වීම් ඇති විය හැක. PTFE පැකින් ද භාවිතා කළ හැකි වුවත්, වාෂ්ප පද්ධති සඳහා වඩාත් විශ්වාසදායක වන්නේ ග්‍රැෆයිට් ය.

question: During maintenance work at sea an engine room rating is moving a heavy component to the workshop using a chain block attached to an overhead trolley on a rail. Part way through the operation the rating is asked by the engineer to go immediately to the store for some equipment. What should the rating do?
answers: Continue with the moving operation until the component is properly secured in the workshop before going to the store for the equipment.
Immediately land the component on the deck and secure it to a hand rail stanchion and go and get the equipment from the store.
Leave the component suspended from the chain block and go and collect the equipment from the store.
correct_answer: Continue with the moving operation until the component is properly secured in the workshop before going to the store for the equipment.

question: A pump cover is sealed using a paper gasket which is damaged during overhaul. There are no spare gaskets available. How should the casing be sealed when reassembling the pump?
answers: Make a new gasket from old chart paper or other similar material of the same thickness as the original gasket.
Put a thick layer of jointing compound on the face of the cover and tighten the cover until the compound squeezes out.
Run a bead of silicon around the outside of the joint after fitting the cover.
Re-use the old gasket.
correct_answer: Make a new gasket from old chart paper or other similar material of the same thickness as the original gasket.

question: A small electric motor needs to be taken to the bottom plates for fitting to a domestic water pump. It is only just too heavy to be manually carried so is to be lowered using the engine room crane. Which of the options given would be a suitable strop to use for the operation?
answers: Any certified strop which has a safe working load greater than the weight of the motor.
Any strop which looks big enough to carry the load.
A wire strop which is rated for twice the required load but is out of certification.
Any piece of rope will do as the motor is only just too heavy to carry.
correct_answer: Any certified strop which has a safe working load greater than the weight of the motor.
explanation: දොඹකරයක් (Crane) භාවිතයෙන් බර උපකරණයක් පහත් කිරීමේදී, ඒ සඳහා භාවිතා කරන ඕනෑම පටියක් හෝ ලණුවක් (Strop) අනිවාර්යයෙන්ම සහතික කරන ලද (Certified) එකක් විය යුතු අතර එහි ආරක්ෂිත වැඩ බර (Safe Working Load - SWL) අදාළ මෝටරයේ බරට වඩා වැඩි විය යුතුය. මෙය නාවික ඉංජිනේරු ක්ෂේත්‍රයේ ආරක්ෂාව පිළිබඳ මූලික නීතියකි. සහතික නොකළ උපකරණ භාවිතා කිරීම අනතුරුදායක වන අතර ලණුවේ දිග හෝ වර්ගය පමණක් සලකා බැලීම ප්‍රමාණවත් නොවේ.

question: The bottom end bolts for a high speed diesel engine are checked to see if they are fit for service by measuring the free length against a standard length. During overhaul the check reveals that one out of a pair of bolts has exceeded the recommended elongation limit. From the options given select the most appropriate action to be taken.
answers: Replace the pair of bolts with new spares.
Refit the bolts as long as one of them is within the limit it should be ok.
Replace all of the bottom end bolts in the engine with new spares.
Replace the single bolt that has exceeded the limit with a new spare.
correct_answer: Replace the pair of bolts with new spares.
explanation: High speed diesel එන්ජින් වල bottom end bolts යනු ඉතා ඉහළ පීඩනයකට ලක්වන කොටසකි. එහි දිග නියමිත ප්‍රමාණයට වඩා වැඩි වී ඇත්නම් (elongation limit), එයින් අදහස් වන්නේ එම බෝල්ට් එකේ ශක්තිය දුර්වල වී ඇති බවයි. මෙවැනි අවස්ථාවක එක් බෝල්ට් එකක් පමණක් මාරු කිරීම ප්‍රමාණවත් නොවේ, මන්ද අනෙක් බෝල්ට් එකද සමාන ආතතියකට ලක්ව ඇති බැවිනි. එබැවින් බෝල්ට් යුගලයම (pair) අලුත් ඒවා මගින් මාරු කිරීම ආරක්ෂිතම ක්‍රමයයි. එසේ නොකිරීමෙන් ඉදිරියේදී බෝල්ට් එක කැඩී එන්ජිමට දැඩි හානි සිදුවිය හැක.

question: The holding down arrangement for a large 2-stroke diesel engine consists of steel chocks and hydraulically tightened holding down bolts. When carrying out routine maintenance of the arrangement which method, from those given in the options, should be adopted to check that it is in good order.
answers: Check the hydraulic release pressure for the holding down bolts.
Tap the steel chocks with a hammer to see if they move.
Tap the holding down bolts with a hammer to see if they “ring”.
Measure the length of the holding down bolts to make sure they have the correct extension for the recommended tension.
correct_answer: Check the hydraulic release pressure for the holding down bolts.

question: Following repair and refitting of the seawater pipe for the fresh water generator feed line the rating assisting with the work notices that one of the flange joints is leaking. What action should be taken by the rating?
answers: Check the bolts are correctly tightened before informing the engineer so that the flange faces can be cleaned and re-jointed if necessary.
Shut off the water and apply silicon or other sealing compound to the outer edge of the flange joint.
Use a spanner with an extension pipe to try and stop the leak by tightening the flange bolts as much as possible.
Use a hammer and flogging spanner to try and stop the leak by tightening the flange bolts as much as possible.
correct_answer: Check the bolts are correctly tightened before informing the engineer so that the flange faces can be cleaned and re-jointed if necessary.

question: During maintenance work on a fuel tank the engine room ratings are removing scale in preparation for re-coating. One of the ratings suddenly notices the smell of fumes even though the atmosphere had been satisfactorily tested before the work started. What action should the ratings take?
answers: Leave the tank immediately and have the atmosphere retested.
Stop work until the smell disappears and then carry on removing the scale.
Ask for another fan to be switched on to increase the ventilation in the tank.
Put on breathing apparatus and carry on with the task.
correct_answer: Leave the tank immediately and have the atmosphere retested.

question: An engine room rating is assisting the duty engineer during a period of UMS operation. After completing the tasks they have been busy with the engineer and rating leave the engine room which is returned to UMS mode. The rating realises that an oil tank filling valve has been left open. What action should be taken?
answers: Inform the duty engineer immediately so that the engine room can be re-entered and the valve can be shut.
Inform another crewmember that he is going back into the engine room to close the valve.
Just leave the valve open as it is unsafe to enter the engine room alone. The high alarm will sound to notify the engineer when the tank is full.
Re-enter the engine room straight away and shut the valve.
correct_answer: Inform the duty engineer immediately so that the engine room can be re-entered and the valve can be shut.
explanation: UMS (Unattended Machinery Space) මෙහෙයුමකදී යම් වැරදීමකින් තෙල් ටැංකියක් පුරවන වෑල්වයක් (Valve) විවෘතව තබා ගියහොත්, ඒ පිළිබඳව වහාම රාජකාරියේ නියුතු ඉංජිනේරුවරයා දැනුවත් කළ යුතුය. ඉන්පසු නියමිත ආරක්ෂිත ක්‍රමවේද අනුගමනය කර නැවත එන්ජින් රූම් එකට ඇතුළු වී වෑල්වය වසා දැමිය යුතුය. එසේ නොකළහොත් තෙල් පිටාර ගලා (Overflow) ගිනි ගැනීමක් වැනි විශාල විනාශයක් සිදුවීමට ඉඩ ඇත.

question: A spare cylinder head for the generator needs to be lifted from its storage cradle to the generator flat. Because of its location the engine room crane cannot be positioned directly above it. What method should be used to bring the cylinder head into position?
answers: Rig chain blocks to lift the cylinder head from its cradle and then transfer it gradually over to the crane hook by working the chain blocks.
Use a block and tackle to drag the head across to a position beneath the crane.
Use crow bars to lever the cylinder cover across the deck until it is in position below the crane.
correct_answer: Rig chain blocks to lift the cylinder head from its cradle and then transfer it gradually over to the crane hook by working the chain blocks.

question: During overhaul of some plate type compressor valves the engine room rating is asked to clean the valve plates and seat. Some of the valve plates are heavily marked. What action should be taken?
answers: Discard the defective valve plates and replace them with new spares.
Skim the valve plates in the lathe to remove all of the marks.
Dress the valve plates up using a portable grinder.
correct_answer: Discard the defective valve plates and replace them with new spares.

question: Most of the engine makers recommend to change the cylinder head gaskets each time a piston overhaul is carried out. Why?
answers: To obtain a proper sealing and correct distance between piston and cover in TDC position.
To avoid heat transfer to the cylinder head.
To be granted a proper sealing with a new gasket.
To increase the consumption of parts so they can make more money.
correct_answer: To obtain a proper sealing and correct distance between piston and cover in TDC position.

question: A new gasket has been fitted to the manhole cover of a ballast tank. Which of the options given would be a suitable test that the new gasket is correctly fitted?
answers: Carry out a hose test on the manhole cover.
Carry out an air pressure test on the ballast tank.
Fill the tank with water up to capacity.
Fill the tank with water until it overflows through the air vent.
correct_answer: Carry out a hose test on the manhole cover.

question: A plate type heat exchanger in a central cooling system has seawater leaking around the edges of some of the titanium plates. After inspection and reassembly following the manufacturer’s instructions the problem still exists. What action, from the options given, should be taken to rectify the problem?
answers: Fit new gaskets to the each of the plates.
Keep tightening the plate stack until the leakage stops.
Reduce the pressure of the sea water.
Scrap the plates and replace with a new plate stack.
correct_answer: Fit new gaskets to the each of the plates.

question: Which of the options given is the main reason for using a ring spanner to tighten the brass nuts on the cover studs of a pump casing?
answers: It will minimise the risk of slipping off the nut or damaging the nuts.
It can be adjusted to the exact size of the nut.
It will allow the nuts to be tightened correctly.
The nuts can be tightened more with this type of spanner.
correct_answer: It will minimise the risk of slipping off the nut or damaging the nuts.
explanation: පොම්පයක ආවරණයේ ඇති පිත්තල ඇණ (Brass nuts) තද කිරීම සඳහා මුදු හැඩැති යතුරක් (Ring spanner) භාවිතා කිරීමට ප්‍රධාන හේතුව වන්නේ, එමගින් ඇණය මතුපිටින් යතුර ලිස්සා යාම හෝ ඇණයට හානි වීම (Rounding off) අවම කිරීමයි. පිත්තල යනු සාපේක්ෂව මෘදු ලෝහයක් බැවින්, සාමාන්‍ය විවෘත යතුරු (Open-ended spanners) මගින් ඇණයේ දාරවලට හානි වීමේ වැඩි ඉඩක් ඇත. මුදු යතුරක් මගින් ඇණයේ සියලුම පෘෂ්ඨයන්ට සමාන බලයක් ලබා දෙයි.

question: Why should engine and boiler rooms be kept clean and any oil spillage cleaned up immediately?
answers: To reduce risk of fire and the risk of slipping.
To avoid being fined by the port state control.
To reduce the premium to be paid to the insurance company.
To prevent oil spillage from damaging deck paint coatings.
correct_answer: To reduce risk of fire and the risk of slipping.

question: A threaded hole is to be formed in a steel plate using a tap and wrench. When drilling the hole which of the options best describes the required drill size?
answers: The drill should be a smaller size than the diameter of the tap.
The drill should be a bigger size than the diameter of the tap.
The drill should be the same size as the diameter of the tap.
The drill should be the same size at the diameter of the bolt that is to be fitted into the hole.
correct_answer: The drill should be a smaller size than the diameter of the tap.

question: Which of the options given is most likely to result in overheating of a ball bearing fitted to a pump shaft?
answers: Completely filling the bearing with grease.
Fitting a sealed bearing that cannot be greased.
Partly filling the bearing with grease.
Running the pump at full capacity.
correct_answer: Completely filling the bearing with grease.

question: What do you understand by: “Move the pilot ladder”?
answers: Move the pilot ladder means to shift the pilot ladder to a new position.
Move the pilot ladder means to lower the pilot ladder.
Move the pilot ladder means to shift the pilot ladder to the opposite side of the vessel.
Move the pilot ladder means to rig another pilot ladder.
correct_answer: Move the pilot ladder means to shift the pilot ladder to a new position.

question: What do you understand by: “Let go the port anchor”?
answers: Open the port windlass brake.
Put the port windlass brake in gear.
Slacken the port anchor cable.
Put the port windlass brake in gear and lower the anchor.
correct_answer: Open the port windlass brake.

question: In the human body, breathing is controlled by:
answers: The respiratory centre in the brain.
The bronchia.
The lungs.
Movement of heart.
correct_answer: The respiratory centre in the brain.

question: If a casualty has no pulse, the first aider must immediately:
answers: Start heart compression and artificial respiration.
Raise an alarm for help.
Do nothing as the patient is already dead.
Inform the next of kin.
correct_answer: Start heart compression and artificial respiration.

question: An airway should be used when:
answers: The patient is breathing on his own but is doing so with great difficulty.
The patient has stopped breathing.
Patient has injury in the mouth.
The patient is unconscious.
correct_answer: The patient is breathing on his own but is doing so with great difficulty.
explanation: රෝගියෙකු තමා විසින්ම හුස්ම ගන්නා නමුත් එය ඉතා අපහසුවෙන් සිදු කරන්නේ නම් 'airway' එකක් භාවිතා කරයි. මෙහි නිවැරදි පිළිතුර වන්නේ රෝගියාගේ ස්වභාවික ශ්වසන ක්‍රියාවලිය සිදුවුවද, වාත මාර්ගය අවහිර වීම වැළැක්වීමට මෙය අවශ්‍ය වන බවයි. රෝගියා හුස්ම ගැනීම සම්පූර්ණයෙන්ම නතර කර ඇත්නම් airway එකක් පමණක් ප්‍රමාණවත් නොවන අතර කෘතිම ශ්වසනය ලබා දිය යුතුය. අනෙකුත් අවස්ථාවලදී එනම් රෝගියා සවිඥානිකව සිටින විට airway එකක් දැමීමෙන් වමනය හෝ හුස්ම හිරවීමක් ඇති විය හැකි බැවින් එය වැරදිය.

question: Port State Control Officers are authorised to:
answers: Inspect and detain ship that are not meeting the requirements until they are able to demonstrate compliance with the regulations.
Sign oil record book entries.
Regularly inspect ships known to meet the requirement.
Detain ships that are not meeting the requirements for a minimum of 30 days.
correct_answer: Inspect and detain ship that are not meeting the requirements until they are able to demonstrate compliance with the regulations.

question: To prevent inadvertent leaks, bunker manifold not in use should:
answers: Have blank flanges fitted with gaskets and tightened with all bolts in place.
Have blank flanges fitted and tightened with some bolts in place.
Have blank flanges fitted with gaskets and tightened with some bolts in place.
Have blank flanges fitted and tightened with all bolts in place.
correct_answer: Have blank flanges fitted with gaskets and tightened with all bolts in place.

question: What is the main difference between a stuffing box gland and a mechanical seal on a centrifugal pump?
answers: If packing fails the pump can be kept running by tightening the glands, but if a mechanical seal fails it must be renewed to stop the leakage.
Packed stuffing box glands must be cooled by liquid, but mechanical seals do not require any cooling.
Packed stuffing box glands are subject to wear but mechanical seals are not.
correct_answer: If packing fails the pump can be kept running by tightening the glands, but if a mechanical seal fails it must be renewed to stop the leakage.
explanation: Stuffing box gland සහ Mechanical seal අතර ප්‍රධාන වෙනස වන්නේ නඩත්තුවයි. Stuffing box එකක ඇසුරුම් (Packing) දිය වී කාන්දු වීමක් සිදු වුවහොත්, ග්ලෑන්ඩ් එක තද කිරීමෙන් (Tightening) පොම්පය දිගටම ක්‍රියා කරවිය හැක. නමුත් Mechanical seal එකක් අසාර්ථක වුවහොත් එය අනිවාර්යයෙන්ම අලුත් එකකින් ප්‍රතිස්ථාපනය කළ යුතුය; එය තද කිරීමෙන් කාන්දුව නැවැත්විය නොහැක. මේ නිසා කාන්දු වීමකදී වහාම ක්‍රියාත්මක විය යුතු ආකාරය අනුව මෙම උපාංග දෙක වෙනස් වේ.

question: What type of heat exchanger is shown in the illustration?
answers: Plate.
Shell and tube.
Bundle and stack.
correct_answer: Plate.

question: Why use a central cooling system?
answers: It requires less maintenance.
It is not a complicated system.
It is more easy to operate.
It is cheap to install.
correct_answer: It requires less maintenance.
explanation: මධ්‍යගත සිසිලන පද්ධතියක් (Central cooling system) භාවිතා කිරීමේ ප්‍රධාන වාසිය වන්නේ නඩත්තු කටයුතු (Maintenance) අඩු වීමයි. මෙහිදී මුහුදු ජලය ගමන් කරන්නේ ප්‍රධාන හීට් එක්ස්චේන්ජර් (Main heat exchangers) එකක් හෝ දෙකක් හරහා පමණක් වන අතර එන්ජිමේ අනෙකුත් කොටස් සිසිල් කිරීමට මිරිදිය භාවිතා කරයි. මෙහිදී මුහුදු ජලය නිසා ඇතිවන මලකඩ කෑම සහ අවහිර වීම් අවම වන බැවින් නඩත්තු කිරීම පහසු වේ. මෙහෙයුම් පිරිවැය හෝ ඉන්ධන පරිභෝජනය මෙහි ප්‍රධාන හේතුව නොවේ.

question: What is the most likely cause of an increase in the chloride content of the fresh water in a central cooling system?
answers: Leakage of sea water from the central coolers.
Leakage from an oil cooler into the fresh water system.
Insufficient cooling water treatment.
Exhaust gas leakage into the freshwater at the turbochargers.
correct_answer: Leakage of sea water from the central coolers.

question: How is the temperature of the high temperature circuit of a central cooling system normally controlled?
answers: By mixing with water from the low temperature circuit.
By controlling the flow through the fresh water evaporator heating circuit.
By controlling bypass of flow for the central coolers.
correct_answer: By mixing with water from the low temperature circuit.
explanation: මධ්‍යම සිසිලන පද්ධතියක (central cooling system) අධික උෂ්ණත්ව පරිපථයේ (HT circuit) උෂ්ණත්වය පාලනය කරනු ලබන්නේ අඩු උෂ්ණත්ව පරිපථයෙන් (LT circuit) එන සිසිල් ජලය සමඟ මිශ්‍ර කිරීමෙනි (mixing). මෙහිදී thermostatic valve එකක් මගින් අවශ්‍ය උෂ්ණත්වය පවත්වා ගැනීමට සුදුසු අනුපාතයකින් ජලය මිශ්‍ර කරයි. මුහුදු ජලය සෘජුව HT පරිපථයට යෙදීමෙන් එන්ජිමට ලුණු තැන්පත් වී හානි විය හැකි බැවින් අනෙක් ක්‍රම භාවිතා නොකෙරේ.

question: Why is it preferable to have the sea water pressure lower than the fresh water pressure in a sea water cooled heat exchanger for a central cooling system?
answers: Prevent seawater contamination of the central cooling system in the event of seal failure.
To reduce any scale deposits on seawater side.
To minimise the load on the seawater pump motor.
correct_answer: Prevent seawater contamination of the central cooling system in the event of seal failure.
explanation: මධ්‍යම සිසිලන පද්ධතියක (central cooling system), මුහුදු ජල පීඩනයට වඩා මිරිදිය (fresh water) පීඩනය වැඩි මට්ටමක තබා ගන්නේ තාප හුවමාරුකයේ යම් කාන්දුවක් ඇති වුවහොත් මුහුදු ජලය මිරිදිය පද්ධතියට මිශ්‍ර වීම වැළැක්වීමටයි. මිරිදිය පීඩනය වැඩි නම්, කාන්දුවකදී සිදුවන්නේ මිරිදිය මුහුදු ජලය දෙසට ගලා යාමයි (fresh water leakage). එසේ නොවී මුහුදු ජලය මිරිදිය පද්ධතියට ඇතුල් වුවහොත්, ලුණු සහ අපද්‍රව්‍ය නිසා මුළු එන්ජිමම විඛාදනයට ලක්වීමට හා නාල අවහිර වීමට ඉඩ ඇත.

question: What is a system employing a single common freshwater cooler (cooled by means of seawater) called?
answers: Central cooling system.
High temperature freshwater system.
Common cooling system.
Low temperature freshwater system.
correct_answer: Central cooling system.
explanation: මුහුදු ජලය භාවිතයෙන් එකම මිරිදිය සිසිලන පද්ධතියක් (Single common freshwater cooler) හරහා එන්ජිමේ සියලුම කොටස් සිසිල් කරන පද්ධතිය 'Central cooling system' ලෙස හඳුන්වයි. මෙහිදී මුහුදු ජලය සහ එන්ජිමේ මිරිදිය පරිපථය අතර තාප හුවමාරුව මධ්‍යගත ස්ථානයක සිදු වේ. direct cooling හෝ load cooling වැනි පද්ධති මෙයට වඩා වෙනස් වන අතර මධ්‍යගත කිරීම මෙහි ප්‍රධාන ලක්ෂණයයි.

question: On a fire patrol at night you see smoke coming from a closed cabin door. What action should you take first?
answers: Activate the nearest fire alarm button and advise bridge of the location of the fire.
Take a look inside the cabin to see what the situation is.
Get the nearest fire extinguisher and then open the door to see what the situation is.
correct_answer: Activate the nearest fire alarm button and advise bridge of the location of the fire.
explanation: රාත්‍රී කාලයේ ගිනි මුර සංචාරයක යෙදෙන විට වසා ඇති කැබින් දොරකින් දුම් පිටවන බව දුටුවහොත්, වහාම ළඟම ඇති ගිනි අනතුරු ඇඟවීමේ බොත්තම (Fire alarm button) ක්‍රියාත්මක කර නෞකාවේ බ්‍රිජ් (Bridge) එකට එම ස්ථානය පිළිබඳව දැනුම් දිය යුතුය. තනිවම දොර විවෘත කිරීම ඉතා අවදානම් සහගතය, මන්ද දොර විවෘත කිරීමේදී ඇතුළට ලැබෙන ඔක්සිජන් නිසා ගින්න ක්ෂණිකව පිපිරීමක් බඳු විශාල වීමක් (Backdraft) සිදුවිය හැකි බැවිනි. මුලින්ම පණිවිඩය ලබා දීමෙන් සහය කණ්ඩායම් වලට සූදානම් වීමට අවස්ථාව ලැබේ.

question: A piston ring set for a trunk piston engine often includes a slotted ring tensioned by an internal spring. What is the purpose of this type of piston ring?
answers: It is an oil scraper ring.
It is the firing ring.
It is the lowest compression ring.
correct_answer: It is an oil scraper ring.

question: A boiler plant has been shut down for some time. Prior to starting the boiler, which of the following subjects is the “most important” control check?
answers: That the combustion chamber of the boiler is checked being empty for oil and that the pre-ventilation function prior to ignition is functioning.
That the burner unit to be thoroughly checked prior to start.
That fuel oil supply is running on diesel oil.
correct_answer: That the combustion chamber of the boiler is checked being empty for oil and that the pre-ventilation function prior to ignition is functioning.

question: Some engine makers use a copper casket for proper sealing between fuel injector valve, cylinder head and combustion chamber. Why is it so important to use the correct one?
answers: To keep the valve in correct position and to maintain proper sealing.
For proper sealing function.
To avoid combustion gas to overheat the valve.
correct_answer: To keep the valve in correct position and to maintain proper sealing.

question: You are going to start firing a boiler. Which of the below mentioned alternatives do you consider as most important?
answers: A thorough ventilation of the combustion chamber before the ignition takes place.
Bottom-blowing the boiler to be absolutely convinced that water is present in the boiler.
Opening the main steam pressure outlet valve.
correct_answer: A thorough ventilation of the combustion chamber before the ignition takes place.

question: To achieve best possible combustion in our engine, we want to have:
answers: An atomization of the fuel injected into the combustion chamber.
A beam of solid fuel, hitting a warm piston up.
Let some of the fuel go to the overflow pipe.
correct_answer: An atomization of the fuel injected into the combustion chamber.

question: Why are we blowing the engine before start (slow turning on air)?
answers: To be sure that we do not have water collected in the cylinders.
To get fresh air into cylinders ensuring a safe start of the engine.
To be sure that no parts are loose, or that the engine is blocked from rotation.
correct_answer: To be sure that we do not have water collected in the cylinders.

question: A piston ring set for a trunk piston engine often includes a slotted ring tensioned by an internal spring. What is the purpose of this type of piston ring?
answers: It is an oil control ring.
It is the firing ring.
It is a ring to seal the crankcase from the combustion chamber.
correct_answer: It is an oil control ring.
explanation: ට්‍රන්ක් පිස්ටන් එන්ජිමක (trunk piston engine) ඇති ඇතුළතින් ස්ප්‍රිං එකක් සහිත සිදුරු සහිත රින්ග් එක 'Oil control ring' හෙවත් තෙල් පාලනය කරන රින්ග් එක ලෙස හැඳින්වේ. මෙහි ප්‍රධාන කාර්යය වන්නේ සිලින්ඩර් බිත්තියේ ඇති අතිරික්ත ලිහිසි තෙල් පිසදා (scrape) නැවත ක්‍රෑන්ක්කේස් එක වෙත යැවීමයි. එමගින් දහන කුටීරය තුළට තෙල් ඇතුළු වී අනවශ්‍ය ලෙස තෙල් වැය වීම වළක්වයි. සාමාන්‍ය compression rings මගින් සිදු කරන්නේ වායු පීඩනය කාන්දු වීම වැළැක්වීම මිස තෙල් පාලනය කිරීම නොවේ.

question: Why is it important to check the timing on the cylinder oil lubricants?
answers: To get the oil into the cylinder when the piston is in the right position.
To avoid excess lubrication.
To get the right amount of oil into the cylinder.
correct_answer: To get the oil into the cylinder when the piston is in the right position.

question: Why is it important that the combustion chamber of a boiler is properly ventilated prior to ignition?
answers: To avoid an explosion in case any oil vapours are present from oil leakage into the furnace.
To ensure that there is sufficient air for proper combustion.
To remove any deposits from the furnace wall.
correct_answer: To avoid an explosion in case any oil vapours are present from oil leakage into the furnace.
explanation: බොයිලේරුවක් දල්වා ගැනීමට පෙර එහි දහන කුටීරය (Combustion chamber) හොඳින් වාතාශ්‍රය කිරීම (Ventilation/Purging) අතිශය වැදගත්ය. මක්නිසාද යත්, පෙර අවස්ථාවක කාන්දු වූ ඉන්ධන වාෂ්ප කුටීරය තුළ තිබිය හැකි බැවිනි. එම වාෂ්ප ඉවත් නොකර දැල්වීමට උත්සාහ කළහොත් විශාල පිපිරීමක් (Explosion) සිදුවීමට ඉඩ ඇත. මෙය එන්ජින් රූම් එකේ ආරක්ෂාව සඳහා අනුගමනය කළ යුතු අනිවාර්ය පියවරකි.

question: For a 4-stroke diesel engine, the exhaust gas from the funnel is seen to be white/light grey in colour. Which of the options given is the most likely cause of this.
answers: Water leaking into the combustion chamber.
Faulty fuel injection valve.
The engine is burning lubrication oil.
correct_answer: Water leaking into the combustion chamber.

question: During routine checking of an engine following start up it is discovered that the start air pipe to one of the cylinders is hotter than normal. What is the likely cause of this problem?
answers: The air start valve for the cylinder is leaking or stuck open.
The air start line flame trap for the cylinder is burning inside.
The main air start automatic valve has not closed properly.
correct_answer: The air start valve for the cylinder is leaking or stuck open.
explanation: එන්ජිම ක්‍රියාත්මක කළ පසු එයාර් ස්ටාර්ට් පයිප්පය (air start pipe) සාමාන්‍ය ප්‍රමාණයට වඩා රත් වන්නේ නම්, එයට හේතුව එම සිලින්ඩරයේ වායු ආරම්භක වෑල්ව් එක (air start valve) කාන්දු වීම හෝ එය විවෘතව ඇලී (stuck open) තිබීමයි. එවිට සිලින්ඩරය තුළ සිදුවන දහනයේදී ඇතිවන අධික උෂ්ණත්වයෙන් යුත් වායූන් නැවත පයිප්පය දෙසට ගලා එයි. මෙය ඉතා භයානක තත්ත්වයක් වන අතර, එයාර් ස්ටාර්ට් ලයින් එකේ තෙල් වාෂ්ප තිබුණහොත් පිපිරීමක් පවා සිදුවිය හැක. පයිප්පය රත් වීම මිස සිසිල් වීම සිදු නොවන නිසා මෙය වැදගත් ලක්ෂණයකි.

question: What is the purpose of a scum valve often fitted to a steam boiler?
answers: To allow removal of any oil or scum which collects on the surface of the water in the boiler steam drum.
To allow removal impurities from the boiler feed-water.
To allow removal of oil from the surface of the feed water tank.
To allow removal of sludge and mud which may collect in the bottom of the boiler water drum.
correct_answer: To allow removal of any oil or scum which collects on the surface of the water in the boiler steam drum.
explanation: වාෂ්ප බොයිලේරුවක scum valve එකක් සවිකිරීමේ ප්‍රධාන අරමුණ වන්නේ බොයිලේරු ජලය මතුපිට එකතු වන තෙල් හෝ වෙනත් සැහැල්ලු අපද්‍රව්‍ය (Scum) ඉවත් කිරීමයි. මෙම අපද්‍රව්‍ය මතුපිට තිබීම නිසා ජලය පෙණ ගැසීම (Foaming) සහ වාෂ්ප සමග ජල බිංදු පිටතට යාම (Priming) සිදුවිය හැක. පතුලේ ඇති බර අපද්‍රව්‍ය ඉවත් කිරීමට blow-down valve භාවිතා කරන අතර, scum valve එක ජල මට්ටමේ ඇති අපද්‍රව්‍ය සඳහා පමණක් භාවිතා වේ.

question: Why is it important that all the system valves are closed after completing bilge or ballast pumping operations?
answers: To avoid accidental intake of water into the engine room in case of valve or pipeline failure.
To keep the pump housing full or fluid.
To make sure the valves do not seize in the open position.
It isn’t important how the valves are left after pumping operations are completed.
correct_answer: To avoid accidental intake of water into the engine room in case of valve or pipeline failure.

question: The valve that prevents water from backing out of the boiler into the feed-water line is called:
answers: Feed-check valve.
Bottom-blow valve.
Feed-stop valve.
Skin valve.
correct_answer: Feed-check valve.

question: What action should be taken if it is noticed that there is a quantity of oil on the engine room tank top?
answers: Notify the duty engineer and try and find the cause of the leakage so that it can be stopped and the oil cleaned up.
Start the fire pump and wash the oil into the bilges.
Apply foam to the tank top to minimise any risk of fire.
Open the overboard valve and start the bilge pump.
correct_answer: Notify the duty engineer and try and find the cause of the leakage so that it can be stopped and the oil cleaned up.
explanation: එන්ජින් කාමරයේ ටැංකියක් මත (Tank top) තෙල් ප්‍රමාණයක් තිබෙනු දුටුවහොත්, වහාම රාජකාරියේ නියුතු ඉංජිනේරුවරයා දැනුවත් කර, එම තෙල් කාන්දුව සිදුවන ස්ථානය සොයාගෙන එය නැවැත්වීමට පියවර ගත යුතුය. ඉන්පසු එම තෙල් පිරිසිදු කළ යුතුය. තෙල් කාන්දුවක් යනු බරපතල ගිනි අවදානමක් (Fire hazard) වන අතරම, එය නිසි පරිදි පාලනය නොකළහොත් බිල්ජ් (Bilge) හරහා පරිසරයට මුදා හැරීමේ අවදානමක් ද පවතී. කාන්දුව නොනවත්වා පිරිසිදු කිරීමෙන් පමණක් ගැටලුව විසඳෙන්නේ නැත.

question: What should be the first indication that the engine room watchkeepers get that there is oil or water leakage in the engine room?
answers: They should see it on the tank top or in the bilge well during regular inspections.
They should hear the bilge pump start up automatically.
A low level alarm should sound for one of the oil or water tanks.
correct_answer: They should see it on the tank top or in the bilge well during regular inspections.

question: When having a fire alarm during normal working hours, what immediate actions should be taken?
answers: Act according to instructions given in the fire plan.
Start searching for the fire to determine if it is in the engine room.
Everybody gather in the safety centre.
Start the fire pump, the sooner the better.
correct_answer: Act according to instructions given in the fire plan.

question: Which of the following pump types could be damaged if the discharge valve is closed before the motor is stopped?
answers: Gear pump.
Turbine pump.
Propeller pump.
Screw pump.
correct_answer: Gear pump.

question: Which of the following pump types will normally require a separate means of priming?
answers: Centrifugal pump.
Reciprocating.
Gear pump.
Screw pump.
correct_answer: Centrifugal pump.
explanation: සෙන්ට්‍රිෆියුගල් පොම්ප (Centrifugal pump) ස්වයං-ප්‍රයිමින් (self-priming) නොවන බැවින්, ඒවා ක්‍රියාත්මක කිරීමට පෙර වෙනමම ක්‍රමයකින් වාතය ඉවත් කර දියරය පිරවිය යුතුය. මෙයට හේතුව මෙම පොම්ප වලට වාතය තල්ලු කරමින් අඩු පීඩනයක් (vacuum) ඇති කිරීමේ හැකියාව අවම වීමයි. ගියර් පොම්ප හෝ පිස්ටන් පොම්ප වැනි ධන විස්ථාපන (positive displacement) පොම්ප වලට වාතය ඉවත් කර තනිවම වැඩ ආරම්භ කිරීමේ හැකියාව ඇති බැවින් ඒවාට බාහිර ප්‍රයිමින් ක්‍රම අවශ්‍ය නොවේ.

question: Zinc anodes are used on the seawater side of heat exchangers to:
answers: Prevent against corrosion.
Prevent scaling.
Reduce salinity.
Prevent accumulation of marine growth.
correct_answer: Prevent against corrosion.

question: What should the Fitter be asked to do?
answers: The Fitter should be asked to check the level of hydraulic oil in the header tank.
The Fitter should be asked to stack empty oil drums on the forecastle.
The Fitter should be asked to dispose of empty oil drums into the sea.
correct_answer: The Fitter should be asked to check the level of hydraulic oil in the header tank.

question: During replacement of the main bearing shells on a medium speed diesel engine it is necessary to remove both the top and bottom half shells. From the options given select the method that is most commonly employed to remove the bottom half shells from the bearing pockets on an engine with a traditional bedplate?
answers: Fit a driver in the crankshaft oil hole which bears against the edge of the bottom half shell and turn the engine.
Jack up the crankshaft and use a suitable punch to loosen the bottom half shell in the pocket so it can be lifted out with a pair of grips.
Remove the crankshaft so that all the bottom half shells can be removed at the same time.
correct_answer: Fit a driver in the crankshaft oil hole which bears against the edge of the bottom half shell and turn the engine.

question: Which part of the crankshaft of a modern large two stroke diesel engine is most likely to be the origin point for crack initiation during service and therefore needs the greatest attention during maintenance inspection?
answers: The fillet radii.
The keyways.
The oil holes.
correct_answer: The fillet radii.
explanation: නූතන විශාල ස්ට්‍රෝක් දෙකේ ඩීසල් එන්ජින්වල ක්‍රෑන්ක් පතුවළේ (Crankshaft) 'fillet radii' යනුවෙන් හැඳින්වෙන්නේ ක්‍රෑන්ක් පින් (crank pin) එක හෝ ජර්නලය (journal) සහ ක්‍රෑන්ක් වෙබ් (crank web) එක සම්බන්ධ වන වක්‍ර කොටසයි. මෙම ස්ථානය ආතතිය වැඩිපුරම ඒකරාශී වන (stress concentration) ස්ථානයක් බැවින්, එන්ජිම ක්‍රියාත්මක වන විට ඇතිවන චක්‍රීය බලපෑම් හේතුවෙන් ඉරිතැලීම් (crack initiation) ආරම්භ වීමට වැඩිම ඉඩකඩක් පවතී. එබැවින් නඩත්තු පරීක්ෂණ වලදී මෙයට වැඩිම අවධානයක් දිය යුතුය. ක්‍රෑන්ක් වෙබ් එකේ මතුපිට හෝ ජර්නලයේ මැද කොටස සාමාන්‍යයෙන් ඉරිතැලීම් ආරම්භ වන මූලික ස්ථාන නොවන බැවින් එම විකල්ප වැරදි වේ.

question: Modern medium speed diesel engines normally have relatively short crankshafts with large diameter pins. How do these design features affect the reliability of crankshaft deflection readings?
answers: They increase the risk of inaccurate readings due to the “stiff” shaft having very small natural sag which may therefore result in “floating journals” in the static condition.
The design of the crankshaft has very little effect on the readings when compared to the inaccuracies that arise due to human error.
Very short, stiff crankshafts do not deflect even when the engine running so the readings are unaffected.
correct_answer: They increase the risk of inaccurate readings due to the “stiff” shaft having very small natural sag which may therefore result in “floating journals” in the static condition.
explanation: නවීන මධ්‍යම වේග (Medium speed) එන්ජින්වල ක්‍රෑන්ක් පතුවළ කෙටි වන අතර එහි පින් (pins) වල විෂ්කම්භය වැඩිය. මෙමගින් පතුවළ ඉතා ශක්තිමත් (stiff) වන අතර එය ස්වභාවිකව නැමීමට (natural sag) ඇති හැකියාව ඉතා අඩුය. මේ නිසා එන්ජිම ස්ථිතික (static) අවස්ථාවේදී ක්‍රෑන්ක් පතුවළ දරණ (bearings) මත හරියටම නොපිහිටා 'පාවෙන' (floating journals) ස්වභාවයක් පෙන්විය හැක. මෙවැනි තත්ත්වයකදී ලබාගන්නා ක්‍රෑන්ක් පතුවළ ඩිෆ්ලෙක්ෂන් (deflection) අගයන් නිවැරදි නොවන අතර එය එන්ජිමේ පෙළගැස්ම (alignment) පිළිබඳ වැරදි අවබෝධයක් ලබා දිය හැකිය.

question: We are taking a crankshaft deflection control of the engine. The reason is:
answers: To control the weardown of the main bearings.
To control the timing of the ignition.
To control the flexibility of the shaft.
correct_answer: To control the weardown of the main bearings.

question: Which of the options given is one of the main responsibilities of a watch-keeping engineer?
answers: To inform the Chief Engineer of any situations that cannot be controlled during the watch.
To by-pass, adjust and isolate all machinery under his supervision.
To immediately inform the Master of all events that occur during the watch.
correct_answer: To inform the Chief Engineer of any situations that cannot be controlled during the watch.
explanation: මුර සංචාරයේ යෙදෙන ඉංජිනේරුවරයෙකුගේ (watch-keeping engineer) මූලික සහ වැදගත්ම වගකීමක් වන්නේ තම මුරය තුළ ඇතිවන ඕනෑම අසාමාන්‍ය තත්ත්වයක් හෝ තමාට පාලනය කළ නොහැකි ගැටලුවක් පිළිබඳව වහාම ප්‍රධාන ඉංජිනේරුවරයා (Chief Engineer) දැනුවත් කිරීමයි. තනිවම තීරණ ගෙන විශාල හානියක් වීමට ඉඩ නොදී, පළපුරුදු නිලධාරීන්ගේ සහාය ලබා ගැනීම මෙහිදී අපේක්ෂා කෙරේ. අනෙකුත් විකල්ප වන තනිවම අලුත්වැඩියා කිරීම හෝ තොරතුරු රහසිගතව තැබීම අනතුරුදායක විය හැක.

question: Select from the options given the statements that best describes the main duties of an engine room rating who is part of an engine room watch?
answers: Engine room ratings forming part of an engine room watch should assist in efficient and safe watch-keeping routines.
Engine room ratings forming part of an engine room watch should make the tea for the engineers.
Engine room ratings forming part of an engine room watch should verify that the operational parameters of all items of machinery conform to manufacturers instructions.
correct_answer: Engine room ratings forming part of an engine room watch should assist in efficient and safe watch-keeping routines.

question: What is the correct lifting technique?
answers: Legs bent, back straight, using leg muscles to lift.
Legs straight, back bent, using back muscles to lift.
Legs straight, back bent and twisted to the right or to the left while lifting.
correct_answer: Legs bent, back straight, using leg muscles to lift.

question: A drip tray containing oil is on fire. The only fire fighting equipment available is water hose with spray jet/spray nozzle. How, if at all, should you attempt to put out this fire using water?
answers: The water can be applied in a fine spray starting from the front in a sweeping motion.
Water should be applied in a jet to the back of the fire.
Water should be applied to the oil in a single jet only.
correct_answer: The water can be applied in a fine spray starting from the front in a sweeping motion.

question: Which of the following are frequent causes of fires in accommodation?
answers: Smoking in bed; covering of electric fires with blankets; overloading electric plugs.
Covering of electric fires with blankets.
Smoking in bed.
correct_answer: Smoking in bed; covering of electric fires with blankets; overloading electric plugs.

question: The boiler gauge glasses should be blown down:
answers: At the beginning of every watch.
Once a day.
Every hour.
correct_answer: At the beginning of every watch.

question: One of the two water level gauge glasses on the high pressure boiler steam drum has started leaking quite heavily. What action, from the options given, should the boiler watch rating take?
answers: Inform the Officer of the watch immediately so that arrangements can be made to replace the leaking glass.
Try and stop the leak by tightening up the clamping bolts as much as possible.
Place a bucket underneath the leak to catch the water to prevent the area becoming slippery.
correct_answer: Inform the Officer of the watch immediately so that arrangements can be made to replace the leaking glass.
explanation: අධි පීඩන බොයිලේරුවක (high pressure boiler) ජල මට්ටම පෙන්වන වීදුරුවක (gauge glass) දැඩි කාන්දුවක් පවතී නම්, එය වාෂ්ප පිපිරීමක් වැනි භයානක තත්ත්වයකට මග පෑදිය හැක. එබැවින් වහාම රාජකාරියේ නියුතු නිලධාරියා (Officer of the Watch) දැනුවත් කර, පද්ධතිය ආරක්ෂිතව හුදකලා කර වීදුරුව මාරු කිරීමට කටයුතු කළ යුතුය. මෙය නොසලකා හැරීමෙන් බොයිලේරුවේ ජල මට්ටම නිවැරදිව හඳුනාගත නොහැකි වී බොයිලේරුවට හානි විය හැක.

question: What should be the first action to be taken in the event of the water level disappearing out of the boiler water level gauge glass?
answers: Secure all of the burners.
Close the feed-water stop valve.
Call the Chief Engineer.
correct_answer: Secure all of the burners.
explanation: බොයිලේරුවේ ජල මට්ටම පෙනෙන වීදුරුවෙන් (Gauge glass) පහළට ගොස් නොපෙනී ගියහොත්, වහාම කළ යුතු පළමු ක්‍රියාව වන්නේ සියලුම බර්නර් (Burners) නිවා දැමීමයි. ජලය නොමැතිව බොයිලේරුව රත් වීමෙන් (Dry firing) බොයිලේරු නළ පිපිරීමට හෝ විශාල පිපිරීමක් සිදුවීමට ඉඩ ඇත. ජල මට්ටම නැති වූ වහාම ජලය පිරවීමට උත්සාහ කිරීම භයානක ය, මන්ද රත් වූ ලෝහ මතට සිසිල් ජලය වැටීමෙන් ක්ෂණික වාෂ්ප පීඩනයක් ඇති වී බොයිලේරුව පුපුරා යා හැක.

question: Which of the given options best completes the following statement? You should never attempt to light a boiler until:
answers: The furnace purge sequence is completed.
The air register is fully open.
The gauge glass shows the water at normal working level.
correct_answer: The furnace purge sequence is completed.
explanation: බොයිලේරුවක් පත්තු කිරීමට පෙර අනිවාර්යයෙන්ම 'furnace purge sequence' එක සම්පූර්ණ කළ යුතුය. මෙහිදී සිදුවන්නේ උදුන (furnace) තුළ තිබිය හැකි නොදැවුණු ඉන්ධන වාෂ්ප වාතය මගින් ඉවත් කිරීමයි. මෙය සිදු නොකළහොත්, බොයිලේරුව පත්තු කරන අවස්ථාවේදී එම වාෂ්ප ජ්වලනය වී ප්‍රබල පිපිරීමක් සිදුවිය හැකිය. බොයිලේරු ජල මට්ටම පරීක්ෂා කිරීම වැනි අනෙකුත් පියවරයන් වැදගත් වුවත්, පත්තු කිරීමට මොහොතකට පෙර ආරක්‍ෂිතම පියවර වන්නේ මෙම 'Purging' ක්‍රියාවලියයි.

question: According to their physical state, extinguishing agents may be classified in to:
answers: Solid, liquid and gases.
Proteinic and synthetic.
Synthetic, proteinic, gases and liquid.
correct_answer: Solid, liquid and gases.

question: How do the extinguishing agents act?
answers: By cooling, smothering, unfeeding (combustible suppression), inhibition.
By ignifugation.
By inhibition.
correct_answer: By cooling, smothering, unfeeding (combustible suppression), inhibition.

question: When a fire breaks out in the accommodation, cargo holds or on deck, who is in charge of the fire fighting operations?
answers: The person who is designated in the muster list.
The first officer arriving at the scene.
The first person arriving at the scene.
correct_answer: The person who is designated in the muster list.

question: In the fire fighting of fires of a C kind with dry chemical powder extinguishers, the application is performed:
answers: In a continuous way so that the powder spray is in the same direction as the one of the flame.
The chemical powder doesn’t extinguish C fires.
Across the flame, sweeping it.
correct_answer: In a continuous way so that the powder spray is in the same direction as the one of the flame.

question: What is the main purpose of a heat exchanger in a cooling water system?
answers: To transfer heat from one fluid to another.
To filter out impurities in the cooling water.
To add chemicals to the cooling water for improved performance.
To circulate the cooling water through the system without any heat exchange.
correct_answer: To transfer heat from one fluid to another.

question: What type of heat exchanger is shown in the illustration?
answers: Shell and tube.
Plate.
Air-cooled.
Spiral.
correct_answer: Plate.

question: What is the correct name of the part highlighted in the illustration?
answers: Fuel injector.
Carburetor.
Spark plug.
Air filter.
correct_answer: Fuel injector.

question: What is the normal maximum oil content permitted for machinery space bilge overboard discharge via OWS equipment?
answers: 5 ppm.
15 ppm.
50 ppm.
100 ppm.
correct_answer: 15 ppm.

question: Which cleaning agents are suitable for use in machinery space when considering the effect on the function of the oily water separator?
answers: All cleaning agents are suitable regardless of their emulsifying properties.
Only strong chemical cleaning agents should be used.
Only non-emulsifying cleaning agents with self splitting emulsifiers are suitable.
Emulsifying agents should always be avoided to prevent clogging of the separator.
correct_answer: Only non-emulsifying cleaning agents with self splitting emulsifiers are suitable.
explanation: Oily Water Separator (OWS) එකක ක්‍රියාකාරිත්වයට හානි නොවන පරිදි එන්ජින් කාමරයේ පිරිසිදු කිරීම් සඳහා භාවිතා කළ යුත්තේ 'non-emulsifying' සහ 'self-splitting' වර්ගයේ පිරිසිදුකාරක පමණි. සාමාන්‍ය සබන් හෝ පිරිසිදුකාරක මගින් තෙල් සහ ජලය ස්ථිරවම මිශ්‍ර (Emulsify) කරන අතර, එවැනි මිශ්‍රණයකින් තෙල් වෙන් කිරීමට OWS යන්ත්‍රයට නොහැක. නමුත් non-emulsifying පිරිසිදුකාරක භාවිතා කළ විට, තෙල් අංශු නැවත පහසුවෙන් වෙන් වන බැවින් OWS එකට සාර්ථකව තෙල් පෙරීමට හැකි වේ.

question: As a general rule, where would you expect to find a portable fire extinguisher in any space?
answers: Near to the entrance to the space.
In the center of the space for easy access from all directions.
Near electrical panels or machinery.
At the highest point of the space to avoid obstruction.
correct_answer: Near to the entrance to the space.

question: After an engine following start-up it is discovered that the start air pipe to one of the cylinders is hotter than normal. What is the likely cause of this problem?
answers: The air start valve for the cylinder is leaking or stuck open.
The fuel injector for the cylinder is malfunctioning.
There is a blockage in the air start pipe.
The cooling system for the cylinder is operating at a lower pressure than normal.
correct_answer: The air start valve for the cylinder is leaking or stuck open.

question: What is the main purpose of bottom-blowing a boiler?
answers: To remove any accumulated sludge from the water drum.
To increase the steam pressure in the boiler.
To circulate water more evenly in the boiler.
To reduce the temperature of the boiler water.
correct_answer: To remove any accumulated sludge from the water drum.
explanation: බොයිලේරුවක 'bottom-blowing' හෙවත් පහළින් ජලය පිටකිරීමේ ප්‍රධාන අරමුණ වන්නේ එහි පහළ වෝටර් ඩ්‍රම් (water drum) එකේ තැන්පත් වී ඇති මඩ, රොඩු සහ අනෙකුත් ඝන අපද්‍රව්‍ය (sludge) ඉවත් කිරීමයි. බොයිලේරු ජලයේ ඇති ඛනිජ ලවණ සහ අංශු පතුලේ තැන්පත් වීම සාමාන්‍ය දෙයකි. මේවා ඉවත් නොකළහොත් තාප හුවමාරුවට බාධා ඇති වන අතර බොයිලේරු බටවලට හානි සිදු විය හැක. පෘෂ්ඨීය පිරිසිදු කිරීම (surface blowing) මගින් තෙල් හෝ පෙණ ඉවත් කරන අතර, bottom-blowing විශේෂයෙන්ම ඝන අපද්‍රව්‍ය සඳහා වේ.

question: When the boiler safety valves operate due to the boiler pressure being too high the excess steam is discharged to…
answers: The feedwater system to reduce pressure.
The atmosphere via the atmospheric line.
The superheater to reduce temperature.
The exhaust system for cooling.
correct_answer: The atmosphere via the atmospheric line.

question: What is the normal indication that an oil filter is becoming blocked?
answers: The pressure drop across the filter.
An increase in engine oil temperature.
A decrease in oil pressure at the pump outlet.
A change in the color of the oil.
correct_answer: The pressure drop across the filter.
explanation: ඔයිල් ෆිල්ටරයක් අවහිර වී ඇති බව හඳුනාගත හැකි නිවැරදිම දර්ශකය වන්නේ එම ෆිල්ටරයේ ඇතුල් වන පැත්ත සහ පිටවන පැත්ත අතර ඇති පීඩන වෙනසයි (pressure drop across the filter). ෆිල්ටරය තුළ අපද්‍රව්‍ය පිරී ඇති විට, තෙල් ගලා යාමට අපහසු වී ඇතුල් වන පැත්තේ පීඩනය වැඩි වේ. බොහෝ ෆිල්ටර් වල මේ සඳහා differential pressure gauge එකක් සවි කර ඇත. පීඩනය අඩුවීම පමණක් හෝ එන්ජිම නැවතීම වැනි දේ අවහිරතාවය හඳුනා ගැනීමට ප්‍රායෝගික දර්ශක නොවේ.

question: What would be the likely cause if the shaft of a centrifugal pump shows excessive wear in way of the stuffing box?
answers: Over tightening of the gland packing.
Insufficient lubrication of the shaft.
Incorrect alignment of the pump shaft.
High operating temperature of the pump.
correct_answer: Over tightening of the gland packing.

question: What is a hydraulic hand pump usually used for?
answers: A hydraulic hand pump is usually used to tighten G-nuts.
A hydraulic hand pump is used to operate large valves in the system.
A hydraulic hand pump is used to provide cooling to the engine.
A hydraulic hand pump is used to transfer fuel between tanks.
correct_answer: A hydraulic hand pump is usually used to tighten G-nuts.
explanation: හයිඩ්‍රොලික් හෑන්ඩ් පොම්පයක් (Hydraulic hand pump) සාමාන්‍යයෙන් භාවිතා කරන්නේ සිලින්ඩර් හෙඩ්, මේන් බියර්රිං හෝ ටයි රොඩ් වල ඇති හයිඩ්‍රොලික් නට් (G-nuts/Hydraulic nuts) තද කිරීමට හෝ ලිහිල් කිරීමටය. මෙමගින් ඉතා ඉහළ පීඩනයක් යොදා බෝල්ට් එක ඇදීමට (tension) ලක් කරන අතර, එවිට නට් එක පහසුවෙන් කරකවා තද කළ හැකිය. සාමාන්‍ය යතුරකින් (spanner) කළ නොහැකි තරම් ඉහළ බලයක් අවශ්‍ය වන මෙම කාර්යය සඳහා හයිඩ්‍රොලික් පීඩනය අත්‍යවශ්‍ය වේ.

question: What is the correct name of the part highlighted in the illustration?
answers: Intake valve.
Fuel injector.
Exhaust valve.
Camshaft.

question: What is the correct name of the part highlighted in the illustration?
answers: Crankshaft.
Piston.
Timing belt.
Connecting rod.

question: Mention some important thoughts for what you have to do when you recognise that fire breaks out onboard:
answers: Report to bridge or duty officer, actuate the fire alarm, call the persons around the fire and join the fire squad.
Evacuate the area immediately without informing anyone.
Try to put out the fire on your own without using any equipment.
Wait for instructions from the senior officer and do nothing until then.
correct_answer: Report to bridge or duty officer, actuate the fire alarm, call the persons around the fire and join the fire squad.

question: Which activity will have the greatest fire-fighting effect in case of a fire?
answers: Waiting for instructions from the senior officer before acting.
Extinguishing attempt is started immediately.
Ventilating the space before starting any action.
Evacuating the crew before attempting to fight the fire.
correct_answer: Extinguishing attempt is started immediately.

question: What is the meaning of this symbol?
answers: Lifeboat.
Fire extinguisher.
Lifejacket storage.
Emergency exit.
correct_answer: Lifeboat.

question: What is the first thing that should be checked when taking over a boiler watch?
answers: The boiler water level.
The fuel pump pressure.
The exhaust gas temperature.
The condition of the boiler casing.
correct_answer: The boiler water level.
explanation: බොයිලර් වොච් එකක් භාර ගැනීමේදී (taking over a watch) ඉංජිනේරුවෙකු හෝ රේටින්ග් කෙනෙකු මුලින්ම පරීක්ෂා කළ යුත්තේ බොයිලර් එකේ ජල මට්ටමයි (Boiler water level). බොයිලර් එකක ජල මට්ටම අඩුවීම (Low water level) ඉතා භයානක තත්ත්වයක් වන අතර, එයින් බොයිලර් ටියුබ් පිපිරීමට හෝ විශාල අනතුරකට මග පෑදිය හැකිය. වාෂ්ප පීඩනය (Steam pressure) සහ ඉන්ධන උෂ්ණත්වය වැදගත් වුවද, ආරක්ෂාව අතින් ප්‍රමුඛත්වය ලැබෙන්නේ ජල මට්ටමටයි. ජල මට්ටම නිවැරදිව gauge glass එකෙන් පරීක්ෂා කිරීමෙන් පසු අනෙකුත් පරාමිතීන් පරීක්ෂා කළ යුතුය.

question: What is the most likely cause of the boiler exhaust gas being white in colour leaving the funnel?
answers: Fuel oil contamination.
Incomplete fuel combustion.
Too much combustion air.
Excessive soot deposits in the boiler.
correct_answer: Too much combustion air.

question: What is the first action that should be taken by the rating on boiler watch in the event of a flame failure on the boiler?
answers: Call the engineer on watch.
Immediately restart the burner.
Increase the fuel supply.
Open the air registers fully.
correct_answer: Call the engineer on watch.
explanation: බොයිලේරු මුර සේවයේ (boiler watch) යෙදී සිටින විට දැල්ල විසන්ධි වුවහොත් (flame failure), වහාම රාජකාරියේ නියුතු ඉංජිනේරුවරයාට (engineer on watch) දැනුම් දිය යුතුය. දැල්ල විසන්ධි වූ විට බොයිලේරුව තුළට ඉන්ධන පිරීමෙන් පිපිරීමක් සිදුවිය හැකි බැවින්, පුහුණු ඉංජිනේරුවෙකු ලවා එය පරීක්ෂා කර ගැනීම අත්‍යවශ්‍ය වේ. තනිවම එය නැවත ක්‍රියාත්මක කිරීමට උත්සාහ කිරීම බරපතල අවදානමකි.

question: In the event of the water level disappearing out of the boiler water level gauge glass; what should be the first action to be taken?
answers: Secure all of the burners.
Increase the feedwater supply immediately.
Open the steam vent to reduce pressure.
Blow down the boiler to remove sediments.
correct_answer: Secure all of the burners.

question: What kind of process is a fire?
answers: A chemical process.
A thermal process.
All the mentioned alternatives.
An oxidation process.
correct_answer: All the mentioned alternatives.

question: Which of the following measures should be applied when hot work is to be undertaken in a harbour?
answers: To have a hot-work permit.
To rely on natural ventilation.
To notify the ship’s cook.
To carry out the work without any precautions.
correct_answer: To have a hot-work permit.

question: You are carrying out a search in a smoke filled compartment wearing a breathing apparatus. At what stage should you start to make your way out of the compartment?
answers: Leave immediately after entering the compartment to avoid smoke inhalation.
Only start to return when your pressure gauge shows empty.
Regularly check your pressure gauge and note how much air you used to reach your work area. Start to return when you have this amount left plus a reasonable reserve.
Wait until you feel dizzy before making your way out.
correct_answer: Regularly check your pressure gauge and note how much air you used to reach your work area. Start to return when you have this amount left plus a reasonable reserve.
explanation: ශ්වසන උපකරණ (Breathing Apparatus) පැළඳ දුමෙන් පිරුණු ස්ථානයක සෝදිසි කිරීම් කරන විට, ඔබ නිරන්තරයෙන් පීඩන මානය පරීක්ෂා කළ යුතුය. ඔබ වැඩ කරන ස්ථානයට පැමිණීමට වැය වූ වාතය ප්‍රමාණය සහ හදිසි අවස්ථාවක් සඳහා අවශ්‍ය අමතර වාතය (Reserve) ප්‍රමාණය ඉතිරිව ඇති විට ආපසු යාම ආරම්භ කළ යුතුය. අනතුරු ඇඟවීමේ නළාව (Whistle) පිඹින තෙක් සිටීම අවදානම් සහිත වන්නේ එවිට ආපසු යාමට ප්‍රමාණවත් වාතය ඉතිරි නොවිය හැකි බැවිනි.

question: Give the meaning of the following symbol:
answers: Fire alarm panel.
Emergency exit sign.
Fire extinguisher location.
Smoke detector.
correct_answer: Fire alarm panel.

question: A lifejacket is so constructed that a person can correctly don it within a period of:

3 Min.
5 Min.
10 Sec.

Is designed for warm weather use.
correct_answer: Is fitted with a light and a whistle.

question: In which way shall a survivor be hauled out of the sea?
answers: Horizontal.
Vertically.
Diagonally.
In a sitting position.
correct_answer: Horizontal.

question: How much food per person is supplied on a liferaft marked SOLAS B PACK?
answers: None.
1 meal per day.
3 meals per day.
2 snacks per day.
correct_answer: None.

question: How many buoyant smoke signals are carried in each liferaft with SOLAS B pack?
When mustered to an abandon ship drill, what is the first thing you do when entering the muster station?
answers: Put on a life jacket.
Check in with the safety officer.
Wait for further instructions.
Gather your personal belongings.
correct_answer: Put on a life jacket.
explanation: නැව අත්හැර යාමේ පෙරහුරුවකදී (abandon ship drill) හෝ හදිසි අවස්ථාවකදී රැස්වන ස්ථානයට (muster station) පැමිණි වහාම කළ යුතු පළමු සහ වැදගත්ම කාර්යය වන්නේ ජීවිතාරක්ෂක කබාය (life jacket) නිවැරදිව පැළඳ ගැනීමයි. මෙය පුද්ගලික ආරක්ෂාව තහවුරු කරන මූලික පියවරයි. අනෙකුත් කාර්යයන් වන නාමලේඛනය පරීක්ෂා කිරීම හෝ බෝට්ටුව සූදානම් කිරීම සිදු කළ යුත්තේ තමන්ගේ ආරක්ෂාව තහවුරු කර ගැනීමෙන් පසුවය. ජීවිතාරක්ෂක කබාය අතේ තබාගෙන සිටීම හෝ පසුව පැළඳීමට බලා සිටීම වැරදිය.

question: The lowest temperature at which a liquid will give off sufficient vapors to form a flammable mixture with air is known as the:
answers: Boiling point.
Ignition point.

question: What method shall be used when hauling survivors out of the sea (state of survivors is critical)?

Using a rope.
Using a rescue buoy.
Using a helicopter.
correct_answer: Using nets.
explanation: සිහිසුන් හෝ අසාධ්‍ය තත්ත්වයේ සිටින පුද්ගලයින් මුහුදෙන් ගොඩට ගැනීමේදී දැල් (nets) භාවිතා කිරීම වඩාත් ආරක්ෂිත වේ. මෙහිදී පුද්ගලයා තිරස් (horizontal) මට්ටමේ තබා ගනිමින් එසවිය හැකි අතර, එමඟින් හයිපෝතර්මියාව (hypothermia) ඇති අයගේ හෘද ස්පන්දනය නතර වීම වළක්වයි. ලණු හෝ කොකු භාවිතා කිරීමෙන් පුද්ගලයා සිරස් අතට එසවෙන බැවින් එය මාරාන්තික විය හැක.

question: The responsibility for safety and security rests with everybody on board the vessel. General house-keeping rules should be followed. Which of the listed rules is the most important?
answers: Always wear safety gloves.
Report all incidents immediately.
Keep your working area clean and tidy.
Ensure all equipment is stored away.
correct_answer: Keep your working area clean and tidy.
explanation: නැවක ආරක්ෂාව සම්බන්ධයෙන් වැදගත්ම රීතියක් වන්නේ තම සේවා ස්ථානය පිරිසිදුව සහ පිළිවෙලට තබා ගැනීමයි (Keep your working area clean and tidy). එන්ජින් කාමරයේ සිදුවන බොහෝ අනතුරු වලට හේතුව බිම හැලී ඇති තෙල් මත ලිස්සා යාම හෝ අවුල් සහගත ලෙස තබා ඇති මෙවලම් වල පැටලී ඇද වැටීමයි. අනෙකුත් ආරක්ෂක උපකරණ (PPE) පැළඳීම වැදගත් වුවද, අනතුරක් සිදුවීමට ඇති මූලික අවස්ථාව අවම කරන්නේ පිරිසිදුකම මගිනි.

question: Welding and burning are two operations which give the highest risk of a fire on board ship. Which of the following safety precautions may be regarded as the most important in order to minimise this particular risk?
answers: The area where the welding is to take place and adjacent spaces to be cleaned and all unnecessary materials and objects to be removed.
Ensure all personnel wear fire-resistant clothing.
Have fire extinguishers readily available.
Conduct a fire drill before starting the operation.
correct_answer: The area where the welding is to take place and adjacent spaces to be cleaned and all unnecessary materials and objects to be removed.
explanation: නැවක වෙල්ඩින් කිරීමේදී ගින්නක් ඇතිවීමේ අවදානම අවම කිරීමට ගත හැකි වැදගත්ම පියවර වන්නේ එම ස්ථානය සහ ඒ අවට ඇති අනවශ්‍ය ද්‍රව්‍ය හා දැවෙන සුළු දෑ ඉවත් කර පිරිසිදු කිරීමයි. ස්පාර්ක් (Sparks) වැදීමෙන් ගිනි ගත හැකි තෙල් හෝ රෙදි කැබලි ඉවත් කිරීම මගින් ගින්නක් ඇතිවීම මූලිකවම වැළැක්විය හැක. ගිනි නිවන උපකරණ ළඟ තබා ගැනීම වැදගත් වුවද, එය ගින්නක් ඇති වූ පසු කරන දෙයකි; වැළැක්වීමේ පියවරක් ලෙස පිරිසිදු කිරීම ප්‍රමුඛ වේ.

question: Which Security Levels requires the highest security alert?
answers: Security Level 1.
Security Level 2.
Security Level 3.
Security Level 4.
correct_answer: Security Level 3.
explanation: ISPS (International Ship and Port Facility Security) කේතය යටතේ ආරක්ෂක මට්ටම් තුනක් අර්ථ දක්වා ඇත. මෙයින් 'Security Level 3' යනු ඉහළම ආරක්ෂක අනතුරු ඇඟවීමේ මට්ටමයි. මෙම මට්ටම ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කරනු ලබන්නේ කිසියම් ආරක්ෂක තර්ජනයක් සිදුවීමට ආසන්න බවට හෝ සිදුවෙමින් පවතින බවට තහවුරු වූ තොරතුරු ඇති විටය. Level 1 යනු අවම ආරක්ෂක පියවර ගන්නා සාමාන්‍ය මට්ටම වන අතර, Level 2 යනු වැඩි කරන ලද ආරක්ෂක මට්ටමයි. එබැවින්, ඉහළම අවදානම් තත්ත්වයකදී ක්‍රියාත්මක වන්නේ Level 3 වේ.

question: When cleaning boiler burner nozzles that have just been in service the watch rating notices that the nozzle holes are partially blocked. Which one is the preferred method to use in order to avoid damaging the nozzle holes?
answers: Use cleaning wires starting with a small gauge and gradually work up to the full size of the nozzle hole.
Use a high-pressure water jet to clear the blockage.
Use a metal rod to forcefully clear the holes.
Soak the nozzles in a strong acid solution.
correct_answer: Use cleaning wires starting with a small gauge and gradually work up to the full size of the nozzle hole.

question: After cleaning some machinery components at sea, the engine watch rating is instructed to dispose the small amount of dirty diesel oil which is left. How should the dirty oil be disposed?
answers: Dump it overboard in a designated area.
Put it straight into the dirty oil tank for incineration at the next opportunity.
Store it in a container and leave it on deck.
Mix it with water and discharge it into the sea.
correct_answer: Put it straight into the dirty oil tank for incineration at the next opportunity.

question: An engine room rating is assisting the duty engineer during a period of UMS operation. After completing the tasks they leave the engine room which is returned to UMS mode. The rating realizes that an oil tank filling valve has been left open. What action should be taken?
answers: Inform the duty engineer immediately so that the engine room can be re-entered and the valve can be shut.
Wait until the next watch change to report it.
Close the valve from the control panel without re-entering the engine room.
Ignore it, as it is not a critical issue.
correct_answer: Inform the duty engineer immediately so that the engine room can be re-entered and the valve can be shut.

question: The engine room rating has been assisting with ballast operations during a period of engine room watch duty. Ballast operations have stopped for a couple of hours while stores are being taken. What action should the rating take during this break in operations?
answers: Leave the ballast pumps running to maintain pressure.
Keep the ballast valves open for quick access when operations resume.
Inform the duty engineer and wait for further instructions.
Stop all of the ballast pumps and close all of the ballast valves as soon as operations are stopped. Ballast lines should always be closed except when they are being used.
correct_answer: Stop all of the ballast pumps and close all of the ballast valves as soon as operations are stopped. Ballast lines should always be closed except when they are being used.
explanation: බැලාස්ට් (ballast) මෙහෙයුම් තාවකාලිකව නතර කළ විට, සියලුම පොම්ප නතර කර කපාට (valves) වසා දැමිය යුතුය. බැලාස්ට් පද්ධතියේ පයිප්ප මාර්ග භාවිතයේ නොමැති සෑම විටම වසා තැබීම නාවික ආරක්ෂාව සඳහා අත්‍යවශ්‍ය වේ. පද්ධතිය විවෘතව තැබීමෙන් අනපේක්ෂිත ලෙස ජලය පිරීමෙන් නැවේ ස්ථාවරත්වයට (stability) හානි සිදුවිය හැකි බැවින් අනෙකුත් විකල්ප වැරදි වේ.

question: An engine room rating notices that the guard on a running pump is hanging loose due to a missing bolt on the support bracket and it is catching the shaft coupling. What is the best action to take as a repair method?
answers: Attempt to tighten the guard while the pump is still running.
Remove the guard completely and continue operating the pump.
Use tape to secure the guard temporarily until the next maintenance.
Inform the watchkeeper so that the pump can be stopped and a new bolt can be fitted to permanently fix the guard in place.
correct_answer: Inform the watchkeeper so that the pump can be stopped and a new bolt can be fitted to permanently fix the guard in place.
explanation: ක්‍රියාත්මක වන පොම්පයක ආරක්ෂිත ආවරණය (Guard) බුරුල් වී ඇත්නම්, එය වහාම වගකිව යුතු නිලධාරියාට (Watchkeeper) දැනුම් දිය යුතුය. පොම්පය නතර කර අලුත් බෝල්ට් එකක් දමා එය ස්ථිරව සවි කිරීම නිවැරදි ක්‍රමයයි. යන්ත්‍රය ක්‍රියාත්මක වෙමින් පවතිද්දී එය අලුත්වැඩියා කිරීමට උත්සාහ කිරීම හෝ නොසලකා හැරීම භයානක අනතුරු වලට මග පාදයි. එබැවින් යන්ත්‍රය නවත්වා පිළිසකර කිරීම ආරක්ෂිතම ක්‍රමය වේ.

question: The threads on the drain plug for the bronze end cover of a sea water cooled heat exchanger have been badly damaged during maintenance. There is no spare brass plug available. What is the best solution for repairing the heat exchanger?
answers: Use a temporary plug made of rubber.
Make a new brass plug on the lathe to fit the drain hole.
Apply thread sealant to the damaged plug and reuse it.
Leave the drain hole open until a spare plug can be obtained.
correct_answer: Make a new brass plug on the lathe to fit the drain hole.
explanation: තාප හුවමාරුකයක (Heat exchanger) ලෝකඩ කෙළවර ආවරණයක නූල් (Threads) හානි වී ඇති විට සහ අමතර කොටස් නොමැති විට, වඩාත්ම තාක්ෂණික විසඳුම වන්නේ ලැතර් යන්ත්‍රයක් (Lathe) භාවිතයෙන් එම සිදුරට නිවැරදිව ගැලපෙන නව පිත්තල ඇබයක් (Brass plug) සකසා ගැනීමයි. මෙයට හේතුව වන්නේ ලෝකඩ සමග වෙනත් ලෝහ (උදාහරණයක් ලෙස වානේ) භාවිතා කළහොත් ගැල්වනික් විඛාදනය (Galvanic corrosion) ඇති වී උපකරණයට හානි විය හැකි බැවිනි. ලී ඇබ හෝ ප්ලාස්ටික් ඇබ පීඩනය දරා ගැනීමට ප්‍රමාණවත් නොවන නිසා ඒවා නුසුදුසුය.

question: A seawater pipe is holed due to corrosion causing frequent bilge alarms. Which of the given temporary repair methods would be the preferred option to remedy the problem until the pipe can be replaced?
answers: Cover all of the affected area with fibre glass tape and resin/fibre glass mixture.
Wrap the pipe with duct tape.
Use a rubber patch secured with hose clamps.
Seal the hole with epoxy putty.
correct_answer: Cover all of the affected area with fibre glass tape and resin/fibre glass mixture.
explanation: මුහුදු ජල නලයක සිදුරක් ඇති වූ විට, ස්ථිර අලුත්වැඩියාවක් කරන තෙක් වඩාත් සුදුසු තාවකාලික ක්‍රමය වන්නේ රබර් කැබැල්ලක් (rubber insertion) සිදුර මත තබා ජුබිලි ක්ලිප් එකකින් (jubilee clip) තද කිරීමයි. මෙය පීඩනය යටතේ ඇති ජලය කාන්දු වීම වළක්වන ශක්තිමත් ක්‍රමයකි. නිකම්ම ටේප් ගැසීම හෝ රෙදි එතීම වැනි ක්‍රම පීඩනයට ඔරොත්තු නොදෙන බැවින් ඒවා අසාර්ථක විය හැක.

question: Which type of pump is shown in the illustration?
answers: A centrifugal pump.
A diaphragm pump.
A gear pump.
A screw pump.

question: An electric motor is to be aligned to a pump by inserting shims under the motor feet. Which tool would be used to check that the alignment is correct by measurement of the gap between the coupling faces?

A laser alignment tool.

question: Which tool in the options given is the best one for cutting a new external thread on the end of a steel pipe?

question: What does the word «pirates» mean?
answers: Pirates are persons who attempt to board and take over a ship at sea.
Pirates are individuals who work on fishing boats.
Pirates are people who sell goods at a market.
Pirates are sailors who navigate ships safely.
correct_answer: Pirates are persons who attempt to board and take over a ship at sea.

question: What do you call the wide rung on a pilot ladder that prevents the ladder from twisting?
answers: The wide rung on a pilot ladder that prevents it from twisting is called a «Spreader».
The wide rung is called a «Stabilizer».
The wide rung is referred to as a «Support».
The wide rung is known as a «Brace».
correct_answer: The wide rung on a pilot ladder that prevents it from twisting is called a «Spreader».

question: What do you understand by the order: «Move the pilot ladder to the other side»?
answers: It means to raise the pilot ladder higher on the same side.
It means to remove the pilot ladder completely.
It means to adjust the angle of the pilot ladder.
Move the pilot ladder to the other side, means: to shift the pilot ladder to the opposite side of the ship.
correct_answer: Move the pilot ladder to the other side, means: to shift the pilot ladder to the opposite side of the ship.

question: How would you alert others onboard if you saw a person falling overboard?
answers: If I saw a person falling overboard I would shout repeatedly, «Man overboard».
I would ring the ship’s bell.
I would use a whistle to signal.
I would wait for someone else to notice.
correct_answer: If I saw a person falling overboard I would shout repeatedly, «Man overboard».

question: An unconscious casualty who is breathing, should be placed:
answers: In the recovery position.
On their back with their head elevated.
In a sitting position.
Flat on their stomach.
correct_answer: In the recovery position.

question: You must not attempt to move a casualty carelessly, if you suspect patient with:
answers: Fractured spine.
Sprained ankle.
Minor cuts and bruises.
Headache.
